name: BOO! ARE YOU SCARED?
short_description: "Boo! Are you scared?" – game with realistic physics of collisions and destruction, where every step can be the last. Gloomy levels full of dangerous obstacles and bottomless abysses await you.
detailed_description:
"Boo! Are you scared?" – This is an exciting game where every step can be the last. Gloomy levels full of dangerous obstacles and bottomless abysses await you. In this game, you can destroy structures by crashing into them, thanks to realistic physics that activates at your request.

Features:

  • Very strange levels: Each level is shrouded in darkness and mystery, with unique obstacles that will make you shudder. All levels are available at once, but do you dare to complete them?

  • Realistic physics: Destroy structures and enjoy how they collapse with frightening realism.

  • Huge Cat: In the levels you will meet a giant cat, which, despite its intimidating appearance, will become your ally in this dark adventure.

  • Do whatever you want, it's a huge sandbox for fun.

Are you ready to face your fears and complete all the levels without falling into the abyss? Join us and test your nerves in this mystical and scary game!

supported_languages: English, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Portuguese - Brazil, Simplified Chinese, Polish, Russian, Ukrainian, Japanese
